metadata.title: Can't Get Enough Of Your Love, Babe
metadata.lyrics:
[00:01.48] I've heard people say that

[00:08.38] (No, oh, no) but I don't know about that
[00:14.78] There's many times that we've loved and
[00:17.95] We've shared love and made love (well, well, well)
[00:23.14] It doesn't seem to me like it's enough
[00:27.89] There's just not enough of it (oh, yeah, yeah)
[00:30.84] There's just not enough, oh, oh, babe, my babe
[00:35.16] 
[00:38.31] My darling, I can't get enough of your love, babe
[00:44.72] 
[00:46.89] Girl, I don't know, I don't know why
[00:50.35] I can't get enough of your love, babe
[00:55.02] Oh, some things I can't get used to, no matter how I try
[01:00.55] 
[01:03.72] Just like the more you give, the more I want
[01:07.64] And, baby, that's no lie, oh, no, babe
[01:12.78] Tell me, what can I say? What am I gonna do?
[01:18.34] How should I feel when everything is you?
[01:22.08] What kind of love is this that you're givin' me?
[01:26.74] Is it in your kiss or just because you're sweet?
[01:31.04] Girl, all I know is every time you're here
[01:35.79] I feel the change, huh, something moves

[01:43.55] Darling, I can't get enough of your love, babe
[01:51.44] Girl, I don't know, I don't know, I don't know why
[01:55.11] I can't get enough of your love, babe, oh, no, babe
[02:00.23] Girl, if only I could make you see and make you understand
[02:08.36] Girl, your love for me is all I need
[02:12.55] And more than I can stand, oh, well, babe
[02:18.25] How can I explain all the things I feel?
[02:22.41] You've given me so much, girl, you're so unreal
[02:25.86] Still I keep loving you more and more each time
[02:31.00] Girl, what am I gonna do? Because you blow my mind

[02:40.26] I feel the change, something moves
[02:44.68] I scream your name, look what you got me doing
[02:47.97] Darling, I can't get enough of your love, babe, oh, no, babe
[02:54.80]

[03:15.17] Oh, oh, babe
[03:22.88] 
[03:28.46] Yeah, my darling, I can't get enough of your love, babe
[03:38.34] Girl, I don't know, I don't know, I don't know why
